design_philosophy: Making complex 3D technology appear simple and magical. Deep Vantablack environments with stark, highly emissive neon accents. Break the grid with 3D spatial navigation. The interface is a lens looking into a game-like environment. Focus on bloom, depth of field, and physics-based motion. Do not use generic purple or teal. Embrace sharp edges and high-end technical luxury.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Cinematic framing. Elements should feel like they exist in a 3D volume, not a flat 2D page. Generous margins, optical alignment, full viewport height sections (100vh) for scrolling.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Spatial free-form positioning for 3D elements behind the glass. Use Bento grid strictly for data/info panels.

surfaces.glass_panels: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-black/40 border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] rounded-none
surfaces.project_cards: bg-transparent border border-white/10 hover:border-[#E0FF00]/50 transition-colors duration-500 rounded-none

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Text color shifts to Volt Yellow (#E0FF00). Subtle scale up (1.02) and border glow.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: WebGL shader displacement or cinematic camera sweeps (React Three Fiber).
motion_and_interactions.scroll: Lenis smooth scroll is MANDATORY. Tie scroll progress to 3D camera position and timeline.
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Magnetic buttons, cursor-following glow, text scrambling on hover (using JetBrains Mono).

header.style: Fixed, full-width, totally transparent but with a top gradient mask. Navigation links use mono-labels.
header.behavior: Mix blend mode difference or backdrop blur if resting over busy 3D elements.

hero_zone.style: Full 100vh. Massive 'Floating Glowing Text' created with 3D text geometry (drei Text3D) or heavily glowing HTML text. High bloom.
hero_zone.composition: Centralized, dramatic lighting. A true 3D scene.

project_zone.style: 3D Panels. Fetch repos dynamically. UI overlays are glassmorphic cards sitting on top of a React Three Fiber canvas.
project_zone.interaction: Clicking a panel sweeps the 3D camera to focus on it.

skills_zone.style: Orbiting 3D spheres or nodes representing skills (React Three Fiber + Physics). User can drag/toss them.

about_zone.style: Glass Panels floating in 3D space. Sharp, terminal-like aesthetics with cinematic backlighting.

contact_zone.style: Terminal/Cyberpunk form. Glass UI with sharp edges. Neon borders on input focus.

instructions_to_main_agent: 3D SCENE SETUP: Ensure there is a single full-screen `<Canvas>` element fixed in the background. Route scroll events to the 3D camera using Drei's ScrollControls or Framer Motion's useScroll.
POSTPROCESSING: Use `<EffectComposer>` with `<Bloom>` (luminanceThreshold: 1, intensity: 1.5) and `<DepthOfField>` from @react-three/postprocessing.
HTML OVERLAYS: Use Drei's `<Html>` component for UI attached to 3D objects, or use standard z-indexed fixed overlays synchronized with framer-motion.
STYLING: Strictly enforce the deep black background with Volt Yellow (#E0FF00) and Neon Crimson (#FF003C) highlights. Avoid purple and teal completely.
FONTS: Import 'Unbounded', 'Outfit', and 'JetBrains Mono' from Google Fonts into the base css or index.html.
GITHUB REPOS: Fetch from GitHub API. Use standard fallback mock data if API fails. Display as 3D floating glass panels or high-end 2D UI with 3D background.
DATA ATTRIBUTES: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements.
